steps.title: Identify the linear scale factor
steps.content: Each side of parallelogram PQRS is 2 times the corresponding side of parallelogram ABCD. The linear scale factor is therefore $k = 2$.

steps.title: Apply area scaling for similar figures
steps.content:
For similar figures, areas scale by the square of the linear scale factor. With $k = 2$, the area scales by $k^2 = 2^2 = 4$.
$$\text{Area of PQRS} = (\text{Area of ABCD}) \times 4 = 5 \times 4 = 20 \text{ cm}^2$$
That confirms C is correct.
